Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Added a sort option to the events tab to stop the events from being in a random order.
- Changed description to show max 5 lines to stop massive events from taking over the view.
